title: Tier 6: PPM-C eval-time context mixer (standalone + neural mixing)
author: Cwarren15-A

data.description: Standalone classical PPM-C order-2 context mixer used at evaluation time to estimate token probabilities.
Neural model probabilities blended with PPM probabilities using a fixed-alpha mixture.
Confidence-gated adaptive blending variant explored for per-token mixture weighting.

novel_contributions: Classical PPM-C context mixer for eval-time probability blending with the neural model
Fixed-alpha neural/PPM mixture that improves BPB by about 0.015
Zero learned parameters and no artifact size cost
